text.content:
Opening the generator

Click the Loot Cache button in the Items Directory sidebar header.

Building a cache

  1. Tier sets the party's level bracket (T1 1-4, T2 5-10, T3 11-16, T4 17-20). Budget brackets and magic rarity scale with tier.
  2. Terrain picks the environment. Each terrain has its own container art, discovery narration, and item weighting. Base terrains: desert, dungeon, forest, swamp, urban. Content packs add more (arctic, mountain, catacombs, ruins).
  3. Cache Origin flavours the slot layout. Apothecary skews toward consumables, Armaments toward weapons, and so on. Unspecified uses an even spread.
  4. Budget bracket sets the gold window. Click one of the discrete bracket buttons.
  5. Click Generate.

After generating

  • Re-roll individual slots by clicking the die icon on any item row.
  • Drag items from compendiums into the cache preview to inject specific loot.
  • Re-roll or clear coins with the buttons on the coinage row.
  • The container card on the right matches terrain automatically and tracks capacity and weight.

Deploying the cache

  • Drag the container card to the canvas if Item Piles is active. The container lands as an interactive token players can open.
  • Or click Add to Items to create the container in the sidebar.
